title: The Magic Mirror
content:
In a faraway kingdom there lived a prince named Elian. He had a very special gift from a wise old wizard: a magic mirror. This mirror did not show your face. Instead, it showed what you were truly like on the inside.

Prince Elian wished to find a person who was truly kind and good. He invited people from across the kingdom to look into the mirror. He announced: "Whatever you see reflected is the truest image of who you are."

First came Princess Serena, famous throughout the land for her beauty. She swept in wearing jewels and silk, certain she would look magnificent. Instead, the mirror showed a proud, cold face with empty eyes. Serena turned away in fury.

Then came a young girl named Lena from a small village. Her clothes were simple. That very morning she had helped her elderly neighbor carry heavy buckets of water. She came to the palace mostly out of curiosity.

When Lena looked in, the mirror filled with a warm golden glow. Her own face looked back at her, but surrounded by light, her eyes full of warmth and kindness.

Prince Elian stepped forward with a wide smile. "I have found what I was searching for." They talked for hours and quickly became dear friends. In time they married and ruled the kingdom together with fairness and care. The magic mirror reminded all who passed: true beauty lives in kindness.
